case_title: KENNETH JEROME LEE VS. SHANELE DOUGLAS et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED APR-01-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, DIANE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-23-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-23-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF KENNETH JEROME LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHANELE DOUGLAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DIANE DOUGLAS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LEE, KENNETH JEROME AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, SHANELE DOUGLAS, DIANE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-23-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP: $0.00) SERVED APR-18-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, SHANELE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, KENNETH JEROME RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, SHANELE $2,031.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,031.00, DEFENDANT DIANE DOUGLAS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, KENNETH JEROME ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-23-2019 - JUDGMENT.
